0x0	addi s2,s2,2	00000000001010010000100100010011
0x4	addi s3,s3,4	00000000010010011000100110010011
0x8	add s2,s2,s3	00000001001110010000100100110011
0xc	sub s3,s2,s3	01000001001110010000100110110011
0x10	sub s2,s2,s3	01000001001110010000100100110011
0x14	sw s2,38(s8)	00000011001011000010001100100011
0x18	sw s3,43(s6)	00000011001110110010010110100011
0x1c	beq zero,zero,0	00000000000000000000000001100011
